JScience 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.jscience.social.economics
  2. TaskProcessor

Uses of Interface
org.jscience.social.economics.TaskProcessor

Packages that use TaskProcessor
Package
Description
org.jscience.social.economics
Provides comprehensive mathematical models for economic systems, agent-based modeling, and financial analysis.
org.jscience.social.economics.resources
Provides classes and interfaces for representing economic resources.
org.jscience.social.politics
Provides the org.jscience.social.politics module.

  • Uses of TaskProcessor in org.jscience.social.economics

    Classes in org.jscience.social.economics that implement TaskProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bank
    Represents a banking institution capable of managing accounts and providing currency conversion services.
    class 
    Community
    Represents a primitive or cooperative social group where resources are shared.
    class 
    EarthEcosource
    A class representing the Earth as an autonomous organism that produces, stores, and recycles materials.
    class 
    Factory
    An organization specialized in mass production and transformation of resources.
    class 
    Holding
    An organization that owns and controls multiple other companies (organizations).
    class 
    Organization
    Represents a formal social and economic entity (Company, NGO, Government).

  • Uses of TaskProcessor in org.jscience.social.economics.resources

    Classes in org.jscience.social.economics.resources that implement TaskProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Robot
    Represents an autonomous machine (Robot).

  • Uses of TaskProcessor in org.jscience.social.politics

    Classes in org.jscience.social.politics that implement TaskProcessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Administration
    Represents a state-managed administrative organization (agency, ministry, police, etc.).
    class 
    PoliticalParty
    Represents a political party organized for democratic participation and governance.
